title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
